bead.title: Add ddx_list_projects and ddx_show_project MCP tools to server
bead.description: SD-019 and FEAT-002 require MCP tools for project registry enumeration. Currently the MCP handler has ddx_list_beads and similar tools but no project-registry tools. Add ddx_list_projects and ddx_show_project to the MCP tool dispatch in server.go.
bead.acceptance: POST /mcp handles ddx_list_projects (returns all registered projects from state) and ddx_show_project (resolves one project by id or path); both tools appear in the MCP tools list; server_test covers both tools
